description: User is reading the task instructions on the overlay modal.
frame_description: A task instruction overlay is visible over the Google search homepage.

description: User scrolls down within the task instruction modal to read more content.
User clicks the 'Start task' button, dismissing the instruction overlay.
User clicks on the Google search input field to initiate a search.
frame_description: The mobile keyboard appears and the search bar becomes active.

description: User pauses briefly to look at the trending searches list before starting to type.
